items.title: This is a super exciting release
items.title_zh: 这是一个超级令人兴奋的版本
items.description: This is a super exciting release - Claude Fable 5 is the same underlying model as Mythos but with added safeguards. The benchmarks are great and it's SOTA on everything by a margin but I'll add that *qualitatively* also, this is a major-ve…
items.description_zh: 这是一个超级令人兴奋的版本 - Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 具有相同的底层模型，但增加了保障措施。基准测试很棒，而且在所有方面都遥遥领先，但我还要补充一点，*定性*，这是一个主要的...

meta.bio: I like training large deep neural nets.

items.title: btw insane amounts of alpha in telling claude code to "review my code for issues" on Fabl…
items.title_zh: 顺便说一句，在 Fabl 上告诉克劳德代码“检查我的代码是否存在问题”时，阿尔法数量惊人......
items.description: btw insane amounts of alpha in telling claude code to "review my code for issues" on Fable rn while it is not pay per use be prepared to be in abject horror that you shipped anything to prod without a Fable Check™ first https://t.co/wPCWRO…
items.description_zh: 顺便说一句，在《神鬼寓言》rn 上告诉克劳德代码“检查我的代码是否存在问题”时，需要大量的阿尔法，而它不是按使用付费，请准备好在没有先进行《神鬼寓言检查™》的情况下将任何东西发送到产品的极度恐惧 https://t.co/wPCWRO…

items.title: Fable 5 is the biggest step up I’ve felt in our models since Opus 4.5 back in November.
items.title_zh: 自 11 月份推出 Opus 4.5 以来，《神鬼寓言 5》是我在模型中感受到的最大进步。
items.description: Fable 5 is the biggest step up I’ve felt in our models since Opus 4.5 back in November. After 4.5 came out I uninstalled my IDE when I realized that I’d been doing 100% of my coding in a terminal for a few weeks. With Fable, it’s felt like…
items.description_zh: 自 11 月份推出 Opus 4.5 以来，《神鬼寓言 5》是我在模型中感受到的最大进步。 4.5 发布后，当我意识到几周以来我 100% 的编码都是在终端中完成时，我卸载了 IDE。有了《神鬼寓言》，感觉就像……

items.title: We talk a lot about how important it is to set up self-verification loops.
items.title_zh: 我们经常谈论建立自我验证循环的重要性。
items.description: We talk a lot about how important it is to set up self-verification loops. Especially in the age of powerful models that can run for long periods of time, self-verification is a key ingredient that enables the model to run for much longer,…
items.description_zh: 我们经常谈论建立自我验证循环的重要性。特别是在可以长时间运行的强大模型时代，自我验证是使模型能够运行更长时间的关键因素，……
